name: BullFrog AI Holdings, Inc.
business: BullFrog AI Holdings uses its proprietary AI/ML platform, bfLEAP, to analyze pre-clinical and clinical data to improve drug development success. The company generates revenue through contract services, collaborative arrangements, and acquisition of rights to drugs.
namedSuppliers: Johns Hopkins University Applied Physics Lab
Institute of Organic Chemistry and Biochemistry of the Czech Academy of Sciences

exposures.sentence: We use AI/ML to advance medicines for both internal and external projects.
We face significant risks related to the availability, cost, and performance of the computational infrastructure required to train and deploy AI models.
We face risks associated with security breaches or cyberattacks.
We may be subject to laws and regulations governing our use of artificial intelligence.
Export controls, trade restrictions, and national security regulations may limit our ability to operate in certain markets and access critical technologies.

catalysts.event: Planned launch of new scenario-based decision engine solution
catalysts.sentence: In late March 2026, the Company is planning to launch a new scenario-based decision engine solution that is an AI-powered analytical environment designed to support complex decision-making in drug development and biomedical research.

tamClaims.claim: $47.1 billion market opportunity for failed Phase III drugs
tamClaims.sentence: The final arrow shows the math behind the $47.1 billion market opportunity.
